task_completion.description: Navigate to the Chart of Accounts settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Chart of Accounts' screen is visible in the application interface.

task_completion.description: Create a new group named 'Facility Costs'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Facility Costs' is visible as a distinct group entry in the Chart of Accounts list.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Facility Costs' group is located under the 'Expenses' section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Facility Costs' group is visually positioned or nested under the main 'Expenses' heading in the Chart of Accounts.
The text 'Warehouse Rent' is visible as an account entry in the Chart of Accounts list.
The text 'Shop Electricity' is visible as an account entry in the Chart of Accounts list.

task_completion.description: Ensure both new accounts are nested under the 'Facility Costs' group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both 'Warehouse Rent' and 'Shop Electricity' are visually indented or explicitly shown as sub-accounts under the 'Facility Costs' group.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to configure the accounts
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the accounting software's GUI (e.g., clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual accounting application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the actual accounting software (Manager.io), not a text editor, spreadsheet, or mocked-up document.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the expected output into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors (like Notepad or TextEdit) containing the task answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The VLM must verify the exact names and hierarchy in the Chart of Accounts: 1. A group named exactly 'Facility Costs' must exist. 2. This group must be under the 'Expenses' section. 3. Two accounts named exactly 'Warehouse Rent' and 'Shop Electricity' must exist. 4. Both of these accounts must be nested inside the 'Facility Costs' group.
